prompt_text:
### Demographics: 75-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 16 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 78.3 kg; Height 153.3 cm; BMI 33.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/81 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.4%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 8.5%), FPG (12 months ago 177mg/dL; 9 months ago 159mg/dL; 6 months ago 166mg/dL; 3 months ago 167mg/dL; current 184mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.1kg; 9 months ago 78.1kg; 6 months ago 76.9kg; 3 months ago 75.1kg; current 78.3kg), Height (12 months ago 153.3cm; 9 months ago 153.3cm; 6 months ago 153.3cm; 3 months ago 153.3cm; current 153.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 33.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 81mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 119U/L; 9 months ago 113U/L; 6 months ago 120U/L; 3 months ago 115U/L; current 115U/L), AST (12 months ago 98U/L; 9 months ago 90U/L; 6 months ago 89U/L; 3 months ago 97U/L; current 91U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; current 53mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 99mg/g; 9 months ago 104mg/g; 6 months ago 106mg/g; 3 months ago 81mg/g; current 114mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 69mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 73mg/dL; 3 months ago 69mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 116mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 115mg/dL; 3 months ago 112mg/dL; current 106mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
